dct_title_s: Solano County, California GIS Maps & Data
dct_description_sm: This collection of data was produced by the Solano Regional GIS Consortium. Data layers in this collection cover a variety of themes, including: boundaries, election districts, physical features, parcels, and zoning. These data were downloaded from the Solano Regional GIS Consortium Data page (http://regis.solanocounty.com/data.html) and the United States Census Bureau Geography page (https://www.census.gov/geo/maps-data/data/tiger-line.html) on September 14, 2015.
System requirements: Geographic Information Systems (GIS) software that reads ESRI shapefile format.
dct_rights_sm: This item is in the public domain.  There are no restrictions on use.
dct_rightsHolder_sm: This work is in the Public Domain, meaning that it is not subject to copyright.
